fishes text index | photo index Phylum Chordata

Subphylum Vertebrate > fishes Photo index of fishes on Singapore shores 

**Typical fish-shapedsmall < 5cm** **Typical fish-shapedmedium < 5cm** **Typical fish-shapedlarge > 5cm** Globular fishes
round or boxy fishes,
fishes that look like stones Flattened fishes
Flat like pancakes
stingrays Flattened fishes
Flat like pancakes
others e.g., flatfish, flatheads Disk-shaped fishesFlattened sideways
e.g., butterflyfishes, filefish, scats, tripodfishes, angelfishes, moonies, batfishes Long fishes
eel-, snake-like
e.g., eels, eeltail catfishes, catfishes Long fishes
stick-like
e.g., pipefishes, halfbeaks Others mudskippers
odd-shaped fishes: e.g., seahorses
fishes living with other animals:
e.g., anemonefish, shrimp gobies, coral gobies.

how to tell apart

  • the flatfish families commonly seen
  • fishes with flat heads
  • flatworms and slugs
  • sea snakes, eels and eel-like animals
  • fishes that look like stones
  • worm-like animals
